overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a dystopian industrial dockyard in a steampunk setting. The player moves through a rain-soaked courtyard past scattered barrels and blood stains, approaches a burning brazier, then ascends stone stairs along the waterfront with views of distant bridges and towering industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage courtyard with scattered equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial courtyard examining scattered barrels, rope spools, and blood stains on the ground

entered.detail: large cylindrical wooden spool with coiled rope standing upright
red painted metal storage crate with white markings
brick industrial building with green metal roofing and multiple windows
group of wooden barrels lying on their sides with metal bands
dark red blood stain pooled on the concrete ground between barrels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gloomy industrial courtyard surrounded by brick buildings. The camera moves past a large rope spool and red metal crates, revealing wooden barrels and a prominent blood stain on the wet concrete ground. The atmosphere is desolate and overcast, with industrial pipes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dockside area with burning brazier and metal shutter doors

events.description: approaching the burning brazier which casts warm orange light against the cool overcast environment
turning toward the open dock revealing distant bridge structures and the waterfront

agents.ego_description: approaching the lit brazier near the building entrance then turning to face the open dock area

entered.detail: metal fire basket with bright flames providing warm illumination
corrugated metal roll-down door sealed with wooden planks
large metal bridge structure visible in the foggy distance across the water
stone-paved dock surface extending toward the water

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a burning brazier that provides the primary light source in this segment, illuminating sandbags and a metal-shuttered doorway. As the camera turns, the scene opens to reveal a stone dock with views of a distant bridge through the haze. The industrial building remains prominent on the right while the open waterfront becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway ascending along industrial building facade

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone stairs alongside the metal railings
reaching the top of the stairs revealing the upper industrial platform with machinery

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs alongside the industrial building with metal railings

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with metal railings ascending along the building
tall industrial smokestack rising against the overcast sky
metal pipes covered in icicles hanging from the structure above
large cylindrical industrial machine with metal wheels and black housing

segments.scene_description: The camera begins ascending a wide stone staircase with metal railings, moving upward along the industrial building facade. Icicle-covered pipes and a tall chimney become visible against the grey sky. At the top, a large metal industrial device sits near the stairs, and the view opens to show more of the industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with propaganda posters

events.description: continuing along the upper walkway past industrial machinery and posters

agents.ego_description: moving along the elevated walkway examining industrial structures and wall posters

entered.detail: torn paper posters plastered on the brick wall depicting figures and text
elevated stone pathway with puddles and debris
complex metal industrial equipment and piping along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along an elevated industrial walkway lined with torn propaganda posters on the left wall. The path continues past sandbags and industrial machinery, with the large industrial building complex remaining visible ahead. The camera approaches another set of stairs leading further into the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gloomy industrial courtyard that gradually opens onto a hazy waterfront dock. It begins by navigating a desolate space surrounded by brick buildings, moving past a large rope spool and red metal crates to reveal wooden barrels and a blood stain on the wet concrete. As the camera advances, the dim light shifts toward the glow of a burning brazier that illuminates nearby sandbags and a metal-shuttered doorway. The scene then expands as the camera turns away from the industrial structures on the right, revealing a stone dock and a distant bridge emerging through the haze.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a stone staircase into an elevated industrial corridor overlooking a sprawling steampunk complex. It begins by climbing a wide stone staircase with metal railings, moving upward along a building facade where icicle-covered pipes and a tall chimney emerge against a grey sky. As the camera reaches the top and passes a large metal industrial device, the perspective opens to reveal the wider scale of the surrounding industrial district. The scene then shifts onto an elevated walkway lined with torn propaganda posters, continuing past sandbags and heavy machinery. Finally, the camera advances toward another set of stairs that lead deeper into the heart of the industrial complex.
